content: Mar 2026 Actual IRR column has garbage data
Aging cutoff is 91 days from Invoice Date (MMA page 81), not 365 days as previously hardcoded
WAL threshold is 70 days with dual-path carve-out (Path A: WAL≤70, Path B: Extended Age 70-90d ≤5%), not flat 60 days
Non-UAE advance rate removed — all debtors must be UAE per MRPA Eligible Debtor (c)
PAR30 single breach is NOT an Event of Default (MMA Art. 18.3(i)), only PAR60 single breach triggers EoD
Collection Ratio and PvD EoD require 2 consecutive breaches, not single breach (MMA Art. 18.3(ii)-(iii))

Account Debtor validation (session 17): 0/13 approved Account Debtors found in tape Group column. Group column contains 143 healthcare provider/seller names, NOT insurance company (payer) names. MRPA Concentration Limit (d) -- max 10%% non-eligible debtor -- is unenforceable from tape data. Approved debtors: Abu Dhabi National Insurance, Almadallah, Gulf Insurance Group, Daman, FMC Network, MedNet UAE, NAS Neuron, Neuron LLC, NEXtCARE, National General Insurance, Sukoon Insurance, American Life Insurance, Emirates Group.

April 14 tape assessment: 357 deals (355 Executed, 2 Completed) -- appears to be active-deals-only extract, not full portfolio. 5 new columns: Expected collection days (53-364d, mean 88, 71% in 60-90d range), Collection days so far (-448 to 41), AccountManager, SalesManager, Provider. 80 deals overlap with March tape. 0 deals past due per direct DPD calc. Pending Klaim confirmation whether this is active-only or full snapshot.

Expected payment date gap PARTIALLY ADDRESSED: April 14 tape adds Expected collection days (53-364d, mean 88d) and Collection days so far columns. Platform code updated: compute_par() now computes direct DPD when column available (replaces shortfall proxy). DSO Operational and Paid vs Due covenant also enhanced. REMAINING: (1) Account Debtor/payer column still missing, (2) April tape scope unclear (357 active deals vs 7,697 full portfolio in March) -- awaiting Klaim confirmation.

April 15 tape loaded: 8,080 deals (full portfolio, +383 new vs March). 65 columns (5 new: Expected collection days, Collection days so far, AccountManager, SalesManager, Provider). Direct DPD now working: PAR30=36.6% active (breaches 7% covenant), PAR60=34.4% (breaches 5% covenant). DSO Operational direct method: 22.7d weighted delay. Expected payment date gap: RESOLVED. Account Debtor gap: STILL OPEN.
